_meta.description: AIWIZN scenario variant pool. Each node has multiple variants testing the same competency. Random selection per session keeps repeat assessments fresh while preserving psychometric integrity.
_meta.author: AIWIZN / ATEN Inc 2026

variant_seeds._doc: Seed is derived from session.id hashed against node-id. Same session always sees same variant; different sessions see different variants.

competency_targets._doc: Each variant must score on the SAME competency target. This is what keeps the assessment psychometrically equivalent across variants.

s1a.description: Cardiac deterioration recognition + pharmacology choice under hypotension

s1a2.description: Pharmacologic consequence recovery: stop-the-cause vs treat-the-symptom

s1b1.description: Prioritisation under family pressure during STEMI

s1b2.description: SBAR clarity to interventional cardiology team

s1c.description: Ethical reasoning when patient refuses recommended intervention

s2a2.description: tPA risk-benefit decision under timeline uncertainty

s3b.description: Psych safety: speaking up against senior physician

s1a.ecg: ST elevation in II, III, aVF (inferior STEMI)
s1a.key_finding: Inferior STEMI with relative hypotension - right ventricular involvement likely

choices.expert: Aspirin 325mg + cautious morphine titration; hold nitro pending RV assessment

patient.name: Ms. Hartford
patient.presenting: Substernal pressure radiating to left arm x 50 min

s1a.key_finding: Large anterior MI - LAD occlusion likely, high mortality risk

choices.expert: Activate cath lab; dual antiplatelet load; door-to-balloon 90min target

patient.name: Mr. Okonkwo
patient.presenting: Atypical: epigastric discomfort + diaphoresis x 90 min, no chest pain

s1a.ecg: Subtle ST depression V4-V6 + Q waves inferior leads
s1a.key_finding: Silent MI in diabetic - atypical presentation, high index of suspicion required

choices.expert: Treat as ACS despite atypical presentation; troponin + serial ECG

s1a2.event: BP drops to 82/45 after nitroglycerin given

choices.expert: Stop nitroglycerin immediately, fluid bolus, reassess

s1a2.event: HR drops to 42 with new AV block

choices.expert: Atropine 0.5mg, prepare pacing pads, call cardiology

s1a2.event: V-fib arrest in pre-cath holding bay

choices.expert: Immediate defib 200J biphasic, CPR, code team

variants._NOTE: Other nodes (s1b1, s1b2, s1c, s2a, s2a2, s2b, s2c, s3a, s3b, s3c, s3c2) follow the same schema. This file is the v6 scaffold; clinical authoring of remaining 30+ variants is Phase 2 of the build.
